expected_behavior: Valid jobs run only in their tenant; missing/tampered jobs fail closed or quarantine; retries preserve scope and idempotency.
given: A background job, retry, scheduled task, extraction worker, or workflow continuation processes tenant-owned work.
notes: Scenario-specific validator executed against local synthetic users, tenants, policy, Postgres RLS, OPA, egress, audit, and regression evidence as applicable.
required_evidence: Job envelope digest, worker decision, quarantine/retry record, scoped DB/audit trace.
then: Valid jobs run only in their tenant; missing/tampered jobs fail closed or quarantine; retries preserve scope and idempotency.
verification_method: Worker integration tests for valid, missing, changed, replayed, and cross-tenant envelopes.
when: The job executes with valid, missing, stale, or tampered scope metadata.
